mapper.select:
SELECT P.`privateClassId`,P.`className`,P.`firstImgUrl`,P.`imgUrl`,l.`grade` AS grade, P.classType AS classType, (select dm.dataName from data_map dm where dm.idxLabel=2 and dm.nextLabel=4 and dm.price=P.classType) AS classTypeName, P.`classTime`,P.`leastBuyNum`,l.`price` AS classPrice,P.`energy`,P.`classDetail`,P.`validityDay`,P.`createdDate` FROM `private_class` P LEFT JOIN `grade_price_ship` l ON P.`privateClassId`=l.`privateClassId`
AND P.className LIKE concat('%',#{className},'%')
order BY P.createdDate desc
limit #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM private_class
AND className LIKE concat('%',#{className},'%')

SELECT P.`privateClassId`,P.`className`,P.`firstImgUrl`,P.`imgUrl`,l.`grade` AS classType,l.`grade` AS grade,P.`classTime`,P.`leastBuyNum`,l.`price` AS classPrice,P.`energy`,P.`classDetail`,P.`validityDay`,P.`createdDate` FROM `private_class` P INNER JOIN `grade_price_ship` l ON P.`privateClassId`=l.`privateClassId` WHERE P.privateClassId=#{privateClassId}
SELECT * FROM private_class WHERE className=#{className} order by createdDate desc limit 0,1
mapper.delete:
delete from private_class where privateClassId in
#{id}

delete from coach_class_ship where classId in
#{id}

delete from grade_price_ship where privateClassId in
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE private_class SET className=#{className}, firstImgUrl=#{firstImgUrl}, imgUrl=#{imgUrl}, classType=#{classType}, classTime=#{classTime}, leastBuyNum=#{leastBuyNum}, classPrice=#{classPrice}, energy=#{energy}, classDetail=#{classDetail}, validityDay=#{validityDay}, createdDate=#{createdDate} WHERE privateClassId=#{privateClassId}
